initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT (strftime('%Y', '1991-10-21') - strftime('%Y', Birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', '1991-10-21') < strftime('%m-%d', Birthday)) AS Age
FROM Patient
JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE Laboratory.UA = 8.4 AND Laboratory.Date = '1991-10-21';

SELECT (strftime('%Y', '1991-10-21') - strftime('%Y', Birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', '1991-10-21') < strftime('%m-%d', Birthday)) AS Age
FROM Patient
JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE Laboratory.UA = 8.4 AND Laboratory.Date = '1991-10-21';

SELECT (strftime('%Y', '1991-10-21') - strftime('%Y', Birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', '1991-10-21') < strftime('%m-%d', Birthday)) AS Age
FROM Patient
JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE Laboratory.UA = 8.4 AND Laboratory.Date = '1991-10-21';

SELECT strftime('%Y', '1991-10-21') - strftime('%Y', Birthday) - (strftime('%m-%d', '1991-10-21') < strftime('%m-%d', Birthday)) AS Age
FROM Patient
JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE Laboratory.UA = 8.4
  AND Laboratory.Date = '1991-10-21';

SELECT (strftime('%Y', '1991-10-21') - strftime('%Y', Birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', '1991-10-21') < strftime('%m-%d', Birthday)) AS Age
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.UA = 8.4 AND l.Date = '1991-10-21';
